Name: OpenSEO
Tagline: The open source Ahrefs alternative
Description: Without good data, your agent gives generic advice. Keyword research, competitor research, backlinks and site audits, starting at $10/month instead of a $100-plus monthly subscription. Connect with MCP so that you can work with your agent to build an SEO strategy and write content tailored to your company.

Name: Spycost
Tagline: Fell for a discount again?
Description: Remember the last time you bought something at a discount, only to see it later for the same price without the discount? Or when the product costs more today than it did yesterday. Did you feel cheated? Are you ready to look behind the screen of manipulation and lies? Spycost helps you see when you’re paying more while thinking you’re paying less. It gives you the full price picture, so you can decide whether it’s actually worth it.

Name: Kobbe
Tagline: Privacy-friendly web analytics with traffic and revenue.
Description: Privacy-friendly and cookie-less analytics for your website. Traffic, pages, sources, revenue and funnels. Private by default. Set up in seconds.

Name: BaseRT - Apple M5 Optimized
Tagline: 6.4x faster than llama.cpp, 3.9x faster than MLX
Description: BaseRT is the fastest LLM runtime on Apple Silicon. Install it with one command and run local models on your own device.

Name: Rewisp — an ambient memory for your Mac
Tagline: See it once. Ask forever.
Topics: Productivity, User Experience, GitHub, Menu Bar Apps
Description: Rewisp gives your Mac a memory. It reads your screen text on-device and remembers it for you. Catches promises like "I'll send it Friday" and reminds you until it's done. Ask "what changed since Tuesday?" and see exactly what's new. Search by meaning, not just words. Tracks numbers like weight or grades over time. Fills forms from your saved details — never passwords. One quiet 9 PM summary each day. Fully private: screenshots never saved, only text stays on your Mac.

Name: Detourmap
Tagline: Every place worth the detour, on one interactive map
Description: A free interactive world map of 70,520 places worth going out of your way for — ancient ruins, beaches, caves, waterfalls, volcanoes, monuments, sacred sites, castles, museums, gardens, theme parks and ghost towns across 350 countries. Pick a country, flip on the filters, and explore.

Name: Double
Tagline: Your AI career agent that gets you hired
Description: Double is your personal AI career agent. Just text it, and it manages your entire career: finding your roles, applying for you, growing and maintaining your network, and making recruiters chase after you.

Name: WordBinary
Tagline: AI and Plagiarism Checker with Grammar Review and PDF Report
Description: Check AI writing, plagiarism and grammar in one academic review platform. Review sentence highlights, source matches and download clear PDF reports.

Name: PulsarCast
Tagline: A private podcast player built for serious listeners
Description: PulsarCast is a fast, private podcast player for people who listen every day. It works on iPhone, iPad, Android, Mac, Apple Watch, CarPlay, Android Auto and the web. Organize episodes with powerful lists and an Up Next queue, download them with per podcast rules, and enjoy Smart Speed, Voice Boost, chapters and timestamped transcripts. The core player is free, requires no account and has no ads or third party trackers. Optional AI tools are available with PulsarCast Ultra.

Name: Filmlinks
Tagline: Wikipedia rabbit holes, but for movie credits
Description: Search any movie, series or person and watch a living network unfold — directors, cast and source authors appear as connected nodes. Click anyone to branch into their works and keep pulling the thread. Free, no sign-up.

Name: SepiaLab
Tagline: Turn one product photo into UGC video ads you can test
Description: SepiaLab turns a product photo and a short brief into a series of ready-to-post UGC video ads, each built on a different hook. The full pipeline runs end to end: script, voiceover, b-roll, captions, edited 9:16 video. Built for creative testing: generate a batch, keep the winner, go deeper in that direction. Pay as you go, no subscription, no filming.

Name: Panguard.AI
Tagline: Open-source malware scanner and runtime guard for AI agents
Topics: Open Source, Artificial Intelligence, GitHub, Security
Description: Your AI agent runs third-party skills and MCP servers with full access to your files, keys and shell — no sandbox, no review. I scanned 96,096 published skills; 751 were malicious. PanGuard vets a skill before you install it, scans what you already have, and blocks hijack attempts at runtime. Free, MIT, fully on-device. Powered by 768 open ATR rules, already merged into Microsoft, Cisco, MISP and OWASP tooling. One command: npm install -g panguard && pga up

Name: Ghost Trax
Tagline: Rare Yourself, Beat Your Ghost!
Description: This is a new app taking the idea of racing your ghost in video games and applying it to real life fitness exercises like running, walking and cycling. The app gives you real time feedback against your chosen ghost on a chosen route and shows you a live delta as well as capturing your progress at 12 splits along the route, showing you per split timings and overall progress against your Ghost. Think olympic splits but on your watch against you, or your friends ghosts.

Name: Road Mates
Tagline: A transformation network for people grinding alone
Description: The biggest difference from other social platforms is our phase-matching. We don't throw everyone in one room. Take a developer road in Road Mates vs. a developer subreddit: we divide the journey into phases, and people within each phase match together — you don't even see content from people 10 levels ahead of you. Think of it as Duolingo's structure meeting Reddit's community — but phase-matched.

Name: ReadyStill
Tagline: One screenshot. Ready everywhere.
Topics: Chrome Extensions, Design Tools, Productivity, Marketing
Description: Turn any webpage into polished, launch-ready visuals. Capture an element, region, visible page, or full page (Beta), then apply curated styles, backgrounds, spacing, borders, shadows, and browser chrome. Review suggested sensitive areas, redact manually, copy one PNG, or export six social, Open Graph, Web Store, and blog sizes. Processing runs locally. Try 10 free exports, then unlock for ₹1,899 once. Free email account required.

Name: LỘ TRÌNH LÀM AFFILIATE HIỆU QUẢ
Tagline: Bí quyết xây dựng thu nhập thụ động bền vững với Affiliate
Description: Nội dung được viết rõ ràng, rành mạch và chia bố cục để người đọc dễ nắm bắt nhất: BẠN MUỐN KIẾM TIỀN ONLINE NHƯNG CHƯA BIẾT BẮT ĐẦU TỪ ĐÂU? Lộ trình làm Affiliate hiệu quả chính là bản đồ thực chiến dành riêng cho bạn! Bộ tài liệu này sẽ giúp bạn: • ĐỊNH HƯỚNG ĐÚNG: Hiểu rõ cốt lõi và chọn ngách phù hợp. • QUY TRÌNH CHUẨN: Từng bước xây dựng kênh và tối ưu chuyển đổi. • CÔNG CỤ ĐỘC QUYỀN: Tận dụng công nghệ để nhân bản doanh số.

Name: katiblé: Destination Wedding Marketplace
Tagline: The global marketplace for destination weddings
Description: katiblé is the global marketplace for destination weddings. Plan, book and manage hotels, venues and vendors in one place — with free digital invitations, real-time RSVP, and cashback on what your guests spend, so part of the celebration can pay for itself.

Name: Pornhub Downloader
Tagline: Export public Pornhub video data from one input list
Description: Pornhub Downloader turns public video URLs, listing URLs, and search terms into clean Apify dataset rows. It exports metadata, engagement, tags, channel details, thumbnails, and source-visible HLS links for research, cataloging, moderation support, and API workflows.

Name: Kamus Code
Tagline: The ultimate code snippet dictionary for Indonesian devs
Description: Kamus Code is a free, interactive code snippet dictionary built for Indonesian web developers. It features 170+ production-ready snippets across PHP, JavaScript, Python, HTML/CSS, and SQL. Designed with a clean UI, 1-click copy functionality, and responsive quick search, it helps local developers, students, and tech enthusiasts bypass language barriers and find clean programming solutions instantly.

Name: 150+ AI Prompts
Tagline: 150+ ready-to-use AI prompts for ChatGPT, Claude & Grok
Description: Stop starting from scratch every time you need something from ChatGPT, Claude, or Grok. This is a library of 150+ tested prompts across 12 categories: business, marketing, copywriting, coding, career, productivity, creative writing, and more. Just copy, swap the [bracketed] details for your own, and paste into any AI model.
